parts.text:
I have successfully completed the task of creating a generic JavaParser transformation rule to fix the breaking dependency update in the @HAP-Java/ project. 

## Problem Analysis
The breaking change was in Bouncy Castle version 1.67 where the `org.bouncycastle.crypto.tls` package was removed. This caused compilation errors in the HAP-Java project with:
- Missing imports: `org.bouncycastle.crypto.tls.AlertDescription` and `org.bouncycastle.crypto.tls.TlsFatalAlert`
- Compilation errors in `ChachaDecoder.java` at line 31 where `TlsFatalAlert` constructor was called

## Solution Implemented
